typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		GKEY as long,
		CHE_GKEY as long,
		YRD_GKEY as long,
		STATUS as string,
		ORIGIN_LANE as string,
		ORIGIN_BLOCK as string,
		DESTINATION_BLOCK as string,
		PATH_MESSAGE as string,
		EXECUTION_CRITERIA as string,
		MESSAGE as string,
		TIME_FRAME as string,
		CREATOR as string,
		CREATED as string,
		ORIGIN_ACCESS_ENUM as string,
		ORIGIN_ACCESS_TEXT as string,
		DEST_ACCESS_ENUM as string,
		DEST_ACCESS_TEXT as string,
		SYS_PATH_MESSAGE as string,
		EXECUTION_NOTE as string,
		CONFIRMER as string,
		CONFIRMED as string,
		DISPATCHED as string,
		CANCELER as string,
		CANCELED as string,
		COMPLETED as string
	),
	useSchema: false,
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: true,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	moveFiles: ['bronze/moves/load','bronze/moves/archive'],
	format: 'delimited',
	fileSystem: 'malta',
	folderPath: 'bronze/lanechange/load',
	columnDelimiter: ',',
	escapeChar: '\\',
	quoteChar: '\"',
	columnNamesAsHeader: true,
	dateFormats: ['dd-MM-yyyy'],
	timestampFormats: ['yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss.SSS\'Z\'','yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss\'Z\'']) ~> CSV
Aggregate1 derive(created = coalesce(toTimestamp(created,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(created,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(created,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss'),toTimestamp(created,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		confirmed = coalesce(toTimestamp(confirmed,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(confirmed,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(confirmed,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss'),toTimestamp(confirmed,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		dispatched = coalesce(toTimestamp(dispatched,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(dispatched,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(dispatched,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss'),toTimestamp(dispatched,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		canceled = coalesce(toTimestamp(canceled,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(canceled,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(canceled,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss'),toTimestamp(canceled,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')),
		completed = coalesce(toTimestamp(completed,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(completed,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'),toTimestamp(completed,'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss'),toTimestamp(completed,'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss'))) ~> DataTypeConversion
CSV select(mapColumn(
		each(match(true()),
			lower(regexReplace($$,' ','_')) = $$)
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> Select1
Select1 aggregate(groupBy(gkey),
	each(match(name!='gkey'), $$ = first($$))) ~> Aggregate1
select2 alterRow(upsertIf(true())) ~> AlterRow1
DataTypeConversion derive(createdDate = toDate(created),
		creatorType = iif(
    left(creator,4)=='yc_b',
    'System',
    'User'
),
		shift = iif(
    hour(created)>=6 && hour(created)<18,
    'Day',
    'Night'
),
		consider = iif((toDate(created)<= toDate("14-06-2026", "dd-MM-yyyy")),
iif(
    instr(sys_path_message,'XA')>0 ||
    instr(sys_path_message,'XB')>0 ||
    instr(sys_path_message,'XC')>0 ||
    instr(sys_path_message,'XD')>0,
    'No',
    'Yes'
),
/* iif(
    instr(sys_path_message,'XA1')>0 ||
    instr(sys_path_message,'XA2')>0 ||
    instr(sys_path_message,'XA3')>0 ||
    instr(sys_path_message,'XA4')>0,
    'No',
    'Yes'
) */
"Yes"
),
		cancellorType = iif(
    isNull(canceler) || trim(canceler)=='',
    '',
    iif(
        left(canceler,4)=='-sys',
        'System',
        'User'
    )
)) ~> derivedColumn1
derivedColumn1 filter(consider == 'Yes' && in(["T0","T1","UNKNOWN"], time_frame)) ~> filter1
filter1 select(mapColumn(
		gkey,
		status,
		origin_lane,
		origin_block,
		destination_block,
		time_frame,
		creator,
		created,
		sys_path_message,
		confirmer,
		confirmed,
		dispatched,
		canceler,
		canceled,
		completed,
		createdDate,
		creatorType,
		shift,
		consider,
		cancellorType
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select2
AlterRow1 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'malta',
	folderPath: 'gold/lanechange',
	mergeSchema: false,
	autoCompact: true,
	optimizedWrite: true,
	vacuum: 0,
	deletable: false,
	insertable: false,
	updateable: false,
	upsertable: true,
	keys:['gkey'],
	umask: 0777,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> sink2
